title: natsach #5329
definition:
1) to excel, be bright, be preeminent, be perpetual, be overseer,
    be enduring
    1a) (Niphal) enduring (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to act as overseer or superintendent or director or chief
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to excel, be bright, be preeminent, be perpetual, be overseer,
    be enduring
    1a) (Niphal) enduring (participle)
    1b) (Piel) to act as overseer or superintendent or director or chief

    NASB:  preeminent or enduring
